titleStmt.title: SII 27.352: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 352. (A.R. No. 341 of 1930-31.) SĪMANTŪRU, MANGALORE TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 3) set up in the Janārdanasvāmin temple.

This record gives in detail the conditions of agreement reached between Chennaya Mēlaṇṭa alias Kunda-heggaḍe and his nephew on one side and Kinnika-sāmanta alias Bācha-heggaḍe and his nephew Kānta-heggaḍe on the other, in respect of the possession of some lands about which they had become estranged.
It is dated Śaka 1333, Vikṛita, Mīna 13, Monday corresponding to 1411 A.D., March 9.
1) Each line commences with a circle.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: Every line commences with a circle.
div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayēnamaḥ . rāmāya rāmabhadrāya rāmacaṁdrāya vēdha sēēvery line commences with a
raghunāthāya nāthāya sītāyāḥ patayē namaḥ . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁ
dra cāmara cāravē trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī vijayā
bhyu daya śālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1333 neya varttamāna vikṛta saṁvatsarada mīnamasada 1
3neya sō . śrīmatu ceṁnaya mēlaṁṭarāda kuṁdaheggaḍeyaru Avaraḷiya beṁmana
[ ṭiya]ru taṁmoḷēkastarāgi kiṁnikasāmaṁttarāda bācaheggaḍeyaru Avaraḷiya kāṁ
tu hegaḍe saha taṁmoḷoṁdāgi barasida śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare Arikūra
variheggaḍeya bāḷikeya bāḷina gaḍiṁda yitaṁda kobaṁdaṁthā vayimanassunū pari
harsikoṁḍu Ā bāḷikeya nīu navagoppisidariṁda navagenālu koṭṭa ṭhāu
majala toṭṭina hāne sahavāgi beṭubayaliṁda 5260 mūḍe badabhūmi yaṁ
nimage nāu koṭeU mēlāra dēvati heggaḍeya bāḷike baṁduda bāḷikesaha namage
nīu vopisida nīubāḷuha naṁma bāḷikeyalu nīu vokkalāgadu niṁ
ma bāḷiyalu nāu vokkalāgadu nāu nīu Arsanu sarivoḷagebaṁdu horagaṁnya
riṁda yeḍakoṭṭare vobbarobbaru besahoveyakke vobbarobbaru vosage niluha taṁtaṁma
maṁdige tāvē paḍibhattāyavanikkuva śatrumitrugaḷa kāṇsikoṁbavara voṁdāgi kāṇsi ko
ḷuha kāṇsikoḷadavara muṟivare vodāgi niUha yellūru Ayakaḷa yeraḍu jana
(na) luḷalli paryaṁtara Ā caṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi koḍsi naḍavade tappeU yī bāḷikeya
lu vobbarobbaru bakalāgadeṁdu Arikoralu kāṁtēśvarana kallanikideU yellīrigū A
Ayakaḷakkū manuśya dōṣa baṁdare baddiyiṁda mātanāḍi saṁtayisi koḷuhavallade
kuḷagaḷilleṁdu tōnaranalū kāṁtēśvaradēvara kallanikideU yāvakhaṇige tappeveṁdu
kabunada baṭṭaṟalū kāṁtēśvara dēvaru yellūra dēvaru simaṁtūra dēvaru ṣaṇmukha
dēvaru yī nālvaru dēvaru staḷa Abhisēkava māḍsi nīranū taṁdu baḷinīrakuḍideU
yī bhatada vakhaṇege tappidare yidakke sākṣi karsayada śivālyada narasiṁha dēvara sā
kṣi yīvakhaṇige tapidare vāraṇāsiyalu sāvira kavileya koṁdadōṣa taṁtaṁma pi
trugaḷa narakake hākidavaru sāviraliṁgava kittadōṣa yeṁda barasta śāsana śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.352 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
